metadata.description: 先来先服务 FCFS: First-In-First-Out (FIFO). Non-preemptive. Long average waiting time due to the convoy effect. Batch system. Here is a brief Python code example to illustrate a simple FIFO queue, which can be used in batch processing scenarios: ```python from collections import deque class SimpleBatchSystem: def __init__(self): self.queue = deque() def enqueue(self, item): """Add an item to the end of the queue.""" self.queue.append(item) def dequeue(self): """Remove and return the first item in the queue. If the queue is empty, raise an error.""" if not self.is_empty(): return self.queue.popleft() else: raise IndexError("dequeue from an empty queue") def is_empty(self): """Check if the queue is empty.""" return len(self.queue) == 0 # Example usage batch_system = SimpleBatchSystem() batch_system.enqueue('Task1') batch_system.enqueue('Task2') print(batch_system.dequeue()) # Output: Task1 print(batch_system.dequeue()) # Output: Task2 ``` This example demonstrates a basic FIFO queue implementation, which can be used to simulate the behavior of a batch system where tasks are processed in the order they arrive.
